name: Microwaved and Barbecued Beef Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine ketchup with the apple cider vinegar, salt, chili powder, dried oregano, dried minced garlic, ground black pepper, and honey in a microwave-safe dish.
2. Mix well and marinate ribs for 20 minutes.
3. Cover the dish with plastic wrap and microwave at full power for 10 minutes.
4. Remove the plastic wrap and turn the ribs over.
5. Cover with plastic wrap again and continue microwaving for another 10 minutes.
6. Heat a charcoal grill until the coals are white-hot, or preheat a gas grill on high for 5 minutes with the lid closed.
7. Grill the ribs about 4 inches from the hot coals. They will take about 4 minutes per side.
8. Serves 4.
PER SERVING: 870 calories, 63 g protein, 18 g carbohydrate, 59 g fat (25 g saturated), 216 mg cholesterol, 660 m g sodium, 0 g fiber.
